SOURCE: 32896934.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (32896934.pdf)
SUMMARY: Translates business vision into HR initiatives that improve performance, profitability, growth, and employee engagement. Developing, improving, and managing HR strategies in benefits and compensation, employee recruitment and development, ethics and corporate social responsibility, diversity, safety and security, and business strategy.
SKILLS: accounts payable, administrative support, benefits administration, bookkeeping, clerical, Continuous Improvement, databases, employee relations, financial, General Ledger, Human Resources, HR, interpretation, invoicing, legal, employee management, meetings, MRP, payroll, purchasing, recruitment, reporting, research, Safety, scheduling, secretarial, staffing, supervision

SOURCE: 32896934.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 02/2016 to Current
DESCRIPTION: Coordinate and oversee recruitment and orientation program support for other HR assigned special projects. Coordinate and support hiring of temporary hourly employees.

SOURCE: 32896934.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 01/2012 to 01/2015
DESCRIPTION: Coordinate, oversee, and perform a wide variety of administrative, secretarial, and program support activities. Serve as primary point of operational and administrative contact for internal and external constituencies. Participate in the coordination, supervision, and completion of special projects and/or events.

SOURCE: 32896934.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 01/2010 to 01/2012
DESCRIPTION: Provide high-level administrative support for human resources, accounts payable, and purchasing departments. Primary duties include bookkeeping (A/R, A/P, and General Ledger) duties related to daily maintenance and financial period closure as well as Human Resources support focusing on payroll administration, compensation and benefits administration responsibilities.

SOURCE: 32896934.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 01/2000 to 01/2010
DESCRIPTION: Provide high-level administrative support by conducting research, preparing statistical reports, handling information requests, and performing clerical functions such as preparing correspondence, receiving visitors, arranging conference calls, and scheduling meetings. Provide HR administrative support including administration of timekeeping system, coordination of employee time-off scheduling, maintenance of employee information, and interpretation of policy regarding employee time-off.

SOURCE: 32896934.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 01/1983 to 01/1999
DESCRIPTION: Provide bookkeeping and clerical support including monthly invoicing, correspondence, receiving visitors, arranging conference calls, and scheduling meetings. Provide support for Human Resource functional areas including tracking for Workers Compensation, developing employee handbook, and maintaining the material safety data sheets.

SOURCE: 32896934.pdf
DEGREE: Bachelor's Degree, BSM/HRM
INSTITUTION: University of Phoenix
DATES: 2015

SOURCE: 32896934.pdf
DEGREE: Associates Degree
INSTITUTION: Blue Ridge Community College
DATES: 1985
